task_completion.description: Create a sub-location for quarantined items under WH/Stock.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a screenshot in the Inventory app (Configuration -> Locations) showing the creation or existence of a location with 'Quarantine' in the name (e.g., 'Quarantine - Regulatory Hold') and its Parent Location set to 'WH/Stock'.

task_completion.description: Transfer all affected MedSource Pharma lots received within the recall window to the quarantine location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for internal transfers or stock moves transferring the following specific lots to the Quarantine location: AMX-2024-041 (500 units), AMX-2024-089 (200 units), IBU-2024-033 (800 units), and CET-2024-071 (500 units).

task_completion.description: Do not quarantine lots received outside the recall window, lots from other vendors, or control products.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Verify that lot IBU-2024-112 (MedSource, received Mar 8 - outside window) is NOT transferred to quarantine. Additionally, ensure lots AMX-2024-067, CET-2024-015, and all MET/OMP lots remain untouched in WH/Stock.

task_completion.description: Create a Purchase Order from the replacement vendor for the total quarantined quantities.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Purchase Order in the Purchase app where the Vendor is 'SafePharm Industries'. The Order Lines must include Amoxicillin (qty 700), Ibuprofen (qty 800), and Cetirizine (qty 500). A 5% tolerance is acceptable.
Look at the status indicator in the top right of the SafePharm Industries Purchase Order. It must show 'Purchase Order' or 'Locked/Done' (indicating it is confirmed), not 'RFQ' or 'RFQ Sent'.

integrity.description: The agent must interact with the Odoo graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating through the Odoo web interface (Contacts, Inventory, Purchase apps) rather than using a terminal, python script, or direct API calls to manipulate the database.

integrity.description: The agent must discover the recall details by reading the contact notes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a screenshot where the agent opens the 'MedSource Pharma' contact and views the 'Internal Notes' tab to read the recall date range and replacement vendor, rather than magically knowing the dates and vendor.

integrity.description: The agent must use proper Odoo inventory operations to move stock.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent using 'Internal Transfers' or 'Scrap/Inventory Adjustments' to move the lots, rather than just editing HTML text on the page to make it look like they moved.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Recall Window: January 1, 2024 through February 28, 2024. Affected Vendor: MedSource Pharma. Replacement Vendor: SafePharm Industries. Lots that MUST be quarantined: AMX-2024-041 (500 units), AMX-2024-089 (200 units), IBU-2024-033 (800 units), CET-2024-071 (500 units). TRAP LOT (Do NOT quarantine): IBU-2024-112 (600 units, received Mar 8, outside the window). Unaffected Vendor Lots (Do NOT quarantine): AMX-2024-067, CET-2024-015. Control Lots (Do NOT touch): MET-2024-022, MET-2024-045, OMP-2024-019. Expected PO: Vendor = SafePharm Industries; Lines = Amoxicillin (700), Ibuprofen (800), Cetirizine (500); Status = Confirmed ('Purchase Order').
